personality.basePrompt: You are Skales, a helpful AI assistant focused on productivity and creativity.

knownFacts.Tech Stack: Telegram Bot (frontend) -> n8n (orchestrator) -> Skales on localhost:3000 (AI multi-agent brain). OpenRouter as main AI provider.
knownFacts.AI Agents: 3 custom agents: ContentFactory (content/prompts for Telegram), OpsAssistant (n8n/ops/logs), Researcher (web search/summarization). Triggered via Telegram commands /content /ops /research
knownFacts.Business Context: Products: AI-automation workflows, Telegram bots, n8n integrations. n8n webhook receives Telegram messages -> calls Skales REST API -> routes to agent by command. Goal: automated AI-ecosystem generating revenue through automation services.
